items.headline: Dollander's gritty start gives way to wild 11-inning battle

news_items.headline: Sources: MLB, players' union hold first CBA talks
news_items.summary: Top officials from Major League Baseball and the MLB Players Association met Tuesday to officially open up collective bargaining talks a little more than six months before the expiration of the game's labor deal, sources told ESPN.

news_items.headline: Sources: Volpe returns to Yanks; Caballero to IL
news_items.summary: Anthony Volpe is returning to the Yankees, who recalled the former top shortstop prospect from the minor leagues Tuesday.

news_items.headline: Yelich returns to Brewers after missing a month
news_items.summary: The Brewers activated Christian Yelich from the injured list after the outfielder/designated hitter had missed a month with an adductor strain.

news_items.headline: Sources: Struggling Mets call up prospect Ewing
news_items.summary: The Mets have called up their No. 2 prospect, outfielder A.J. Ewing, in hopes of sparking a struggling offense. He will start against the Tigers on Tuesday.

news_items.headline: Dodgers acquire OF Thomas in trade with D-backs
news_items.summary: The Dodgers have acquired outfielder Alek Thomas from the Diamondbacks in exchange for an outfield prospect, the teams announced Tuesday.

news_items.headline: Betts rejoins Dodgers after five weeks on IL
news_items.summary: Mookie Betts returned from the IL after a five-week absence on Monday, with the Dodgers hoping he can help spark a sluggish offense.

news_items.headline: Rangers scratch Eovaldi due to side tightness
news_items.summary: Rangers right-hander Nathan Eovaldi was scratched from his scheduled start Monday against the Diamondbacks night because of left side tightness.

news_items.headline: Shotaro Morii set to begin his MLB 3-way player journey
news_items.summary: Athletics minor leaguer Shotaro Morii continues his journey as a three-way player on Tuesday for the Stockton Ports

news_items.headline: Caballero has fractured finger, prompting Yanks to recall Volpe
Gamethread 5/12: Phillies at Red Sox
Yankees recall Anthony Volpe, place José Caballero on IL with broken finger
news_items.summary: Everyone has a plan until you break your finger.

news_items.headline: Texas Rangers lineup for May 12, 2026
news_items.summary: The Rangers and the D-Backs, again

news_items.headline: Mets’ president of baseball operations David Stearns speaks to media
news_items.summary: Stearns is speaking to the media as per usual ahead of the Mets’ homestand.

news_items.headline: Mets' A.J Ewing feels confident, comfortable ahead of 'dream come true' MLB debut
news_items.summary: A.J. Ewing was a bit surprised himself to receive the call up to the big-league level this week, but now that he's here he feels ready to help the struggling Mets.

news_items.headline: Brewers activate Christian Yelich to finally bring lineup back to full strength
news_items.summary: Tyler Black was optioned to Triple-A to make room for Christian Yelich’s return

news_items.headline: Yankees recall SS Anthony Volpe, place José Caballero on 10-day IL with finger fracture on right hand
news_items.summary: The 25-year-old Volpe started at least 147 games at shortstop for New York each of the past three seasons.
